scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && esbuild src/handler.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node22 --format=esm --log-level=warning '--banner:js=import { createRequire } from "module"; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);' --outfile=dist/index.mjs && rm -f dist/wake-listener.zip && cd dist && zip -qX wake-listener.zip index.mjs
